ctaLabel.free: Get started free with the Free plan
ctaLabel.pro: Get started with the Pro plan
ctaLabel.team: Get started with the Team plan

sources.a: We monitor over 100 sources including major AI blogs, Arxiv papers, Twitter/X accounts, YouTube channels, Reddit communities, and industry newsletters.

scoring.q: How does the AI scoring work?
scoring.a: Each article is scored by Claude AI based on relevance, novelty, and impact. Scores range from 0 to 100. You can set a minimum score threshold for your digests.

schedule.a: Yes. You can set up to 3 daily digest times and choose instant alerts for high-priority keywords.

languages.a: Articles are automatically translated and summarized in French, English, and Arabic. The original content is always preserved.

freePlan.a: Yes. The free plan includes 10 monitored sources, 1 daily digest, and WhatsApp delivery. No credit card required.

testimonials.title: What our users say
testimonials.subtitle: AI professionals save hours every day with AI News.

1.name: Marie L.
1.quote: I used to spend 2 hours a day on manual monitoring. AI News delivers the essentials every morning with spot-on relevance scoring.

2.name: Karim T.
2.quote: The WhatsApp digest is the first message I read every morning. The Arxiv + HackerNews coverage is impeccable.

3.name: Yasmine B.
3.quote: Finally a tool that understands not everyone has time to read 50 articles a day. The summaries are remarkably high-quality.

cta.title: Ready to stay ahead of AI?
cta.subtitle: Join 2,400+ professionals who get their AI news through AI News.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.content: AI News ("we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy describes how we collect, use and protect your personal information when you use our AI monitoring service.

dataCollected.title: Data Collected
dataCollected.content: We collect information you provide directly: email address, name, notification preferences and digest settings. We also collect anonymized usage data to improve the service.

usage.title: Data Usage
usage.content: Your data is used to personalize your AI digests, send notifications according to your preferences and improve the quality of our summaries and relevance scores.

sharing.title: Data Sharing
sharing.content: We never sell your personal data. We share information only with our technical subcontractors (hosting, messaging) necessary for the operation of the service.

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.content: Your data is retained as long as your account is active. You can request deletion of your account and all associated data at any time.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.content: In accordance with GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify, delete and port your data. Contact us to exercise these rights.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: For any questions regarding this policy, contact us at privacy@ainews.app.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By using AI News, you agree to these terms of service. If you do not agree, please do not use the service.

service.title: Service Description
service.content: AI News is an automated monitoring service that aggregates, summarizes and translates artificial intelligence news from 100+ sources, delivered via WhatsApp, email or Telegram.

accounts.title: User Accounts
accounts.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials and all activities conducted under your account.

content.title: Content
content.content: Summaries and scores generated by AI News are produced automatically by artificial intelligence. We do not guarantee their accuracy and encourage you to verify original sources.

payment.title: Payment and Subscriptions
payment.content: Paid plans are billed monthly or annually at your choice. You can cancel your subscription at any time. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period.

termination.title: Termination
termination.content: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your access in case of violation of these terms. You can delete your account at any time from your settings.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.content: AI News is provided "as is". We are not responsible for decisions made based on information provided by the service.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: For any questions, contact us at legal@ainews.app.
